subcodes.first_line: O thou mighty one! The proof of might is humility, submissiveness, lowliness and utter self-effacement at the Threshold of the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقتدر دلیل اقتدار خضوع و خشوع و تذلل و انکسار بدرگاه حضرت پروردگار است
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
